subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is considered a major battleground in Rajasthan's history?
question_hi: राजस्थान की मुख्य समुद्र सितारा नेत्रवास के विवरण के विभाग
explanation_en:
The Battle of Haldighati is considered a major battleground in Rajasthan's history. It was fought between Pratap Singh of Mewar and Akbar in 1576.

राजस्थान के विभाग
The Battle of Haldighati is considered a major battleground in Rajasthan's history. It was fought between Pratap Singh of Mewar and Akbar in 1576.
